name: PC-EFTPOS (Aus)/Linkly - Setup and FAQ
body:
[{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can integrate PC-EFTPOS (Linkly) with "}, {"text": "Retail Express", "bold": true}, {"text": " for Australian retailers, enabling integrated payment processing at POS supporting all major Australian card schemes and payment types. This helps optimize your retail operations by streamlining checkout processes, reducing transaction errors through integrated payment processing, and supporting Australian payment standards including contactless and mobile payments."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Find "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/216-pc-eftpos-aus-linkly-setup-and-faq#faqs", "children": [{"text": "FAQs and related articles", "bold": true}]}, {"text": " ", "bold": true}, {"text": "at the bottom of this page"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Retail Express supports integrated EFTPOS services through the use of PC-EFTPOS terminals. For New Zealand customers, please refer to the NZ specific instructions "}, {"text": "here"}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Update as of February 2020 - ", "bold": true}, {"text": "PC-EFTPOS has been renamed to Linkly but is still currently referred to as PC-EFTPOS within the Retail Express application."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppVupEAE.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppVupEAE.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "pc-eftpos-2.jpg"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Non-integrated mode"}], "data-id": "non-integrated-mode"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Please ensure you contact the terminal provider to determine how to process sales in "}, {"text": "Non-Integrated", "bold": true}, {"text": " mode using the terminal's menu. This is required in the event the computer is offline, the integration has failed, or most commonly, to take payment over the phone for a transaction."}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "A non-integrated or "manual" transaction is often referred to as a MOTO Transaction and it is vital all staff understand how to process these on the terminal if needed."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Before you begin:"}], "data-id": "before-you-begin"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h4", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/216-pc-eftpos-aus-linkly-setup-and-faq#latest-version", "children": [{"text": "Ensure the latest version of PC-EFTPOS is installed"}]}], "data-id": "ensure-the-latest-version-of-pc-eftpos-is-installed"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Ensure the latest version of PC-EFTPOS is installed on the PC where the terminal is located. Click on the link below to access the latest version, or "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.linkly.com.au/contact-us", "children": [{"text": "contact PC-EFTPOS"}]}, {"text": " for further information."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppVBhEAM.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppVBhEAM.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "mceclip0 - 2023-07-08T224832.977.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "PC-EFTPOS will be able to assist you to install and connect the terminal. This must be done before beginning the Hardware Utility (the utility takes the installed terminal and connects it to Retail Express)."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Update as of February 2020 - ", "bold": true}, {"text": "PC-EFTPOS has been renamed to Linkly but is still currently referred to as PC-EFTPOS within the Retail Express application."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h4", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/216-pc-eftpos-aus-linkly-setup-and-faq#pc-paired", "children": [{"text": "PC must be paired and showing as connected"}]}], "data-id": "pc-must-be-paired-and-showing-as-connected"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The PC with PC-EFTPOS must be paired and showing as connected within the PC-EFTPOS software. To check this:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The PC-EFTPOS software icon is typically found in the "Notification Area" in Windows, located in the bottom right-hand corner beside the clock."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click on the notification area arrow to expand the notification tray:"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppVuuEAE.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppVuuEAE.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "mceclip1 (70).png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Look for the PC EFTPOS icon (depending on your version of PC-EFTPOS, the logo will be displayed as:"}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "	A white "C" with a green dot:"}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "	or"}, {"text": "

Contact "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.linkly.com.au/contact-us", "children": [{"text": "PC EFTPOS"}]}, {"text": " for more information and assistance"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h4", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/216-pc-eftpos-aus-linkly-setup-and-faq#payment-type-enabled", "children": [{"text": "Enable the "PC EFTPOS" Payment Type"}]}], "data-id": "enable-the-pc-eftpos-payment-type"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To prompt a PC EFTPOS payment in POS, the "PC EFTPOS" Payment Type will need to be selected. This Payment Type needs to be enabled prior to beginning the integration process so that it's available for the staff to select."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To enable the Payment Type:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Navigate to "}, {"text": "Settings > Payment Types", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Tick the "}, {"text": "Enabled ", "bold": true}, {"text": "and "}, {"text": "POS ", "bold": true}, {"text": "tick boxes for "PC EFTPOS""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "If this payment method should award Loyalty Points ensure the "}, {"text": "Loyalty ", "bold": true}, {"text": "option is ticked"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Save Changes", "bold": true}]}]}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppVvdEAE.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppVvdEAE.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "mceclip2 (46).png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "What you will need:"}], "data-id": "what-you-will-need"}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Retail Express Client ID", "bold": true}, {"text": " (if installing the Hardware Utility for the first time) - this is located within Retail Express by navigating to "}, {"text": "Help & Support > What's my Client ID", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Retail Express "}, {"text": "User name and Password", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "If installing to multiple computers but with only one PC EFTPOS terminal, the "}, {"text": "IP address", "bold": true}, {"text": " of the PC where the PC EFTPOS terminal is connected. If you're not sure how to obtain this information please contact an IT Professional. Ask them about setting up a "Static IP" for that computer to avoid any issues in the future."}]}]}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "If you encounter any issues within the PC-EFTPOS software displaying any errors or not functioning you will need to "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.linkly.com.au/contact-us", "children": [{"text": "contact PC-EFTPOS"}]}, {"text": " directly."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Connecting PC EFTPOS:"}], "data-id": "connecting-pc-eftpos"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The integration uses the "}, {"text": "Retail Express Hardware Utility", "bold": true}, {"text": " to connect and configure the PC EFTPOS Terminal."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If you have not yet installed this utility, click on the link for instructions on how to download and install the utility on the computer. During the installation process you will be able to select PC EFTPOS to connect to; follow the instructions below from that point onwards."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type":
